---
title: "Final Project - PDAC Data Analysis"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

setwd("~/Classes/BMI7235 - Machine Learning/Final Project")

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tableone)
library(mice)

```

```{r}

# Import data
metadata <- read_xlsx("GSE314577/GSE314577_VUMC_Metadata_ch_revised.xlsx")

# Inspect the metadata structure
names(metadata)
head(metadata, 3)

# Table One
demo <- metadata %>%
    transmute(
        CC = factor(CC),
        Sex = factor(Sex),
        Race = factor(Race),
        Age = as.numeric(age_sam)
    )

sex_counts_by_cc <- demo %>%
    count(CC, Sex, .drop = FALSE) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = CC, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)

race_counts_by_cc <- demo %>%
    count(CC, Race, .drop = FALSE) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = CC, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)

age_summary <- demo %>%
    group_by(CC) %>%
    summarise(
        Min = min(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
        Max = max(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
        Median = median(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
        Mean = mean(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
        SD = sd(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
    )

# Histogram of Age
png("age_histogram.png", width = 6 * 72, height = 5 * 72)
hist(
    demo$Age,
    main = "Histogram of Age Distribution",
    xlab = "Age",
    breaks = 10
)
dev.off()

age_summary_total <- demo %>%
    summarise(
        CC = "Total",
        Min = min(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
        Max = max(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
        Median = median(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
        Mean = mean(Age, na.rm = TRUE),
        SD = sd(Age, na.rm = TRUE)
    )

tableone_vars <- c("Sex", "Race", "Age")
tableone_factor_vars <- c("Sex", "Race")
tableone_obj <- CreateTableOne(
    vars = tableone_vars,
    strata = "CC",
    data = demo,
    factorVars = tableone_factor_vars,
    addOverall = TRUE
)

sex_counts_by_cc
race_counts_by_cc
age_summary
age_summary_total

tableone_mat <- print(
    tableone_obj,
    showAllLevels = TRUE,
    quote = FALSE,
    noSpaces = TRUE,
    test = TRUE,
    smd = TRUE,
    printToggle = FALSE
)
print(tableone_mat)

write.csv(tableone_mat, "tableone_pdac.csv", row.names = TRUE)
tableone_html <- knitr::kable(
    tableone_mat,
    format = "html",
    table.attr = "class=\"table table-striped\""
)
writeLines(tableone_html, "tableone_pdac.html")

```

```{r}
# Assess missing data patterns in demographic variables

# for each variable, get the count of missing values
missing_counts <- sapply(demo, function(x) sum(is.na(x)))
print(missing_counts)

missing_proportions <- round(colMeans(is.na(demo)), 4)
print(missing_proportions)

if (any(missing_counts > 0)) {
    missing_pattern <- mice::md.pattern(demo, plot = TRUE)
    print(missing_pattern)

    missing_indicator_data <- demo %>%
        mutate(
            missing_Sex = as.integer(is.na(Sex)),
            missing_Race = as.integer(is.na(Race)),
            missing_Age = as.integer(is.na(Age))
        )

    missing_by_cc <- missing_indicator_data %>%
        group_by(CC) %>%
        summarise(
            n = n(),
            missing_Sex = sum(missing_Sex),
            missing_Race = sum(missing_Race),
            missing_Age = sum(missing_Age),
            .groups = "drop"
        )
    print(missing_by_cc)

    pairwise_missing <- t(is.na(demo)) %*% is.na(demo)
    print(pairwise_missing)

    png("demographic_missing_pattern.png", width = 7 * 72, height = 5 * 72)
    mice::md.pattern(demo)
    dev.off()
} else {
    cat("No missing demographic data detected in CC, Sex, Race, or Age.\n")
}

```
